digest.en: US forces will maintain a blockade around the Strait of Hormuz "as long as it takes," according to Hegseth. The US has also warned Iran that it will "shoot to destroy" any ships laying mines in the Strait. Israel and Lebanon have extended their ceasefire amid the uncertainty.
digest.hi: संयुक्त राष्ट्र में विदेश मंत्री एस जयशंकर ने शांति स्थापना के लिए यूएन चार्टर के प्रावधानों पर जोर दिया। उन्होंने दुनिया के सामने शांति की आवश्यकता पर प्रकाश डाला। एशिया-प्रशांत क्षेत्र में बढ़ते युद्धों ने वैश्विक चिंता बढ़ाई है।

articles.title: U.S. Blockade Around Strait of Hormuz Will Last ‘as Long as It Takes,’ Hegseth Says
articles.summary: U. S. National Security Adviser Hegseth says the U. S. blockade around the Strait of Hormuz will last as long as it takes. The blockade was imposed in response to Iran's actions in the region.

articles.title: Hegseth warns Iran that US forces will ‘shoot to destroy’ any ships laying mines in Strait of Hormuz
articles.summary: U. S. National Security Adviser Hegseth warns Iran that U. S. forces will shoot to destroy any ships laying mines in the Strait of Hormuz. The warning comes amid ongoing tensions between the U. S. and Iran.

articles.title: Britain and Spain Reject Reported Plans by Trump to Punish Them
articles.summary: for insufficiently supporting the war in Iran. The reported plans were outlined in a leaked Pentagon email. Britain and Spain Reject Reported Plans by Trump to Punish Them.

articles.title: US, Iran Prepare For 2nd Round Of Talks In Pak Without Vance, Ghalibaf
articles.summary: The US has confirmed that two key officials will fly to Pakistan tomorrow for talks with Iran. The talks aim to address the ongoing conflict. US Confirms Talks With Iran, 2 Key Officials To Fly To Pak Tomorrow.

articles.title: Israel and Lebanon extend ceasefire amid Hormuz uncertainty
articles.summary: Israel and Lebanon extended their ceasefire amid uncertainty in the Hormuz region. Live updates: Israel and Lebanon extend ceasefire amid Hormuz uncertainty NBC News.

articles.title: Trump dispatches Witkoff, Kushner to Pakistan for new talks with Iran’s foreign minister, JD Vance
articles.summary: Trump dispatches a delegation to Pakistan for talks with Iran's foreign minister. The delegation includes Witkoff and Kushner, and is aimed at resolving tensions between the U. S. and Iran. Trump dispatches Witkoff, Kushner to Pakistan for new talks with Iran’s foreign minister, JD Vance.

articles.title: Raghav Chadha, six AAP MPs join BJP | Above the Fold | 24.04.2026
articles.summary: Raghav Chadha and six AAP MPs join the BJP in a major shake-up. The move is seen as a significant shift in Indian politics, with Chadha citing policy differences with the AAP as his reason for joining the BJP.

articles.title: US envoys will head to Pakistan on Saturday for fresh Iran talks
articles.summary: Iran's top diplomat is heading to Pakistan for fresh talks, sources say. Live updates: Iran’s top diplomat heads to Pakistan as fresh talks expected, sources say CNN. Live updates: US envoys will head to Pakistan on Saturday for fresh Iran talks CNN.

articles.title: Kohli leads Bengaluru chase in IPL as Sudharsan's ton goes in vain
articles.summary: Virat Kohli led Bengaluru to a win after Sudharsan scored a ton. Kohli leads Bengaluru chase in IPL as Sudharsan's ton goes in vain.

articles.title: Trump dispatches Witkoff, Kushner to Pakistan for talks with Iran’s FM Araghchi; Vance on ‘standby’
articles.summary: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi is set to arrive in Pakistan tonight for talks with the US, with a US delegation likely to follow on April 25 to discuss a framework for negotiations.

articles.title: Trump Sending 2 Key Officials To Pak For Talks With Iran: Report
articles.summary: Trump is sending officials to Pakistan for talks with Iran. The Iranians have not confirmed if they are going to meet with the US delegation. Trump Sending 2 Key Officials To Pak For Talks With Iran: Report.

articles.title: Vance on 'standby' as Witkoff, Kushner to reach Pakistan on April 25 for talks with Iran, White
articles.summary: Iran's foreign minister is leading a delegation to Islamabad for talks with Pakistani officials. The Iranian delegation will discuss regional developments and the war situation. Iranian delegation led by FM Araghchi to reach Islamabad tonight; to “hold bilateral consultations on developments in the region, as well as the latest situation” in the war.

articles.title: Zelenskyy visits Saudi Arabia, Putin weighs G20 attendance
articles.summary: Zelenskyy visited Saudi Arabia as Putin considers attending the G20. Russian President Putin "may or not may not" attend the G20 in Miami in December, says the Kremlin. Meanwhile, after securing an EU loan, Ukrainian President Zelenskyy continued his diplomatic offensive in Saudi Arabia.

articles.title: Alcaraz’s French Open threepeat dream ended by wrist injury
articles.summary: Carlos Alcaraz will miss the French Open due to a wrist injury. Carlos Alcaraz lost world number one spot to Jannik Sinner after their Monte Carlo final and now misses Roland Garros.

articles.title: Three Kosovo Serbs jailed over deadly gun battle and monastery siege
articles.summary: Kosovo's court has sentenced three Serbs to prison for their roles in a deadly gun battle and monastery siege in 2023. Two men received life imprisonment, while one was sentenced to 30 years.

articles.title: In Britain, 7 Unelected Lords Help Block an Assisted Dying Bill
articles.summary: Seven unelected Lords blocked a bill to legalize assisted dying in Britain. A small group in the House of Lords proposed hundreds of amendments that helped stymie a bill that was meant to legalize medically assisted death for the terminally ill.

articles.title: France's Cosmobilis in talks to buy World Rally Championship rights, sources say
articles.summary: France's Cosmobilis is in talks to acquire the rights to the World Rally Championship, according to sources. The deal would mark a significant development in the championship's ownership. France's Cosmobilis in talks to buy World Rally Championship rights, sources say.

articles.title: UN peacekeeper dies of wounds suffered in Lebanon last month: UNIFIL
articles.summary: A UN peacekeeper has died from wounds sustained in Lebanon last month, the UNIFIL mission reported. The death toll for UN peacekeepers now stands at six. Death toll stands at six; Indonesia has urged UN to launch a thorough investigation.

articles.title: Tehran’s Imam Khomeini Airport airport to resume international flights on April 25
articles.summary: Tehran's Imam Khomeini Airport will resume international flights on April 25. The first flights will be to Istanbul and Muscat, marking a restart for the airport's international services. The first flights to resume will be to Istanbul and Muscat.

articles.title: As Putin Orders That the Economy Be Fixed, Russia Grasps for Solutions
articles.summary: Russia's central bank cut interest rates again amid wartime spending strains. Another interest-rate cut highlights the narrowing path for the country’s central bank amid the strains of immense wartime spending.

articles.title: Pirates hijack oil tanker off the coast of Somalia
articles.summary: Pirates hijacked an oil tanker off the coast of Somalia. This incident marks a resurgence of piracy in the Indian Ocean, an area once notorious for such attacks. Piracy, once notorious in this stretch of the Indian Ocean, has made a comeback in recent years.

articles.title: विश्व में बढ़ते युद्ध: कब थमेगा ये संघर्ष?
articles.summary: वैश्विक स्तर पर युद्ध बढ़ रहे हैं. इस संघर्ष के कारणों और समाधान के बारे में चर्चा हो रही है. विश्व में बढ़ते युद्ध: कब थमेगा ये संघर्ष?

articles.title: युद्ध के लिए तैयार ट्रंप, ईरान ने दी चेतावनी- एक और नरक बना देंगे
articles.summary: अमेरिकी राष्ट्रपति डोनाल्ड ट्रंप ने कहा है कि वह ईरान के साथ युद्ध के लिए तैयार हैं। ईरान ने इस पर चेतावनी दी है कि अगर अमेरिका ने हमला किया तो वह एक और नरक बना देंगे। दोनों देशों के बीच तनाव बढ़ रहा है।
